Sample_Name_i18n.pt-BR: Hélice de aeromodelo de três pás
Sample_Name_i18n.es: Hélice de aeromodelo de tres palas

Sample_Description: The three-blade model-airplane example from demo_collection(), including its hub and 3 mm bore.

Sample_Description_i18n.en: The three-blade model-airplane example from demo_collection(), including its hub and 3 mm bore.
Sample_Description_i18n.pt-BR: Exemplo de aeromodelo de três pás de demo_collection(), incluindo o hub e o furo de 3 mm.
Sample_Description_i18n.es: Ejemplo de aeromodelo de tres palas de demo_collection(), incluido el cubo y el orificio de 3 mm.
Sample_Description_i18n.fr: Exemple d’aéromodèle à trois pales de demo_collection(), avec moyeu et alésage de 3 mm.
Sample_Description_i18n.de: Dreiblatt-Modellflugzeugbeispiel aus demo_collection(), einschließlich Nabe und 3-mm-Bohrung.
Sample_Description_i18n.ru: Трёхлопастной пример авиамодели из demo_collection() со ступицей и отверстием 3 мм.

Source.Adaptation_Notes: OpenSCAD automatic profilepoints/slices were converted to 14 points per surface and 1 mm radial spacing. The exact NACA transition station is not forced into the loft. Release 1.1 uses the validated split-trailing-edge workflow: open main-surface loft without guides, a separate trailing-edge loft with two exact vertex rails, pre-Stitch XY trimming when needed, and Boundary Fill with 0.1 mm diameter overlap.
